prestazioni: LS3 6.2L V8 (L92-derived, 415hp stock) forced induction via Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA ball-bearing turbo (86mm compressor, 62mm turbine) with custom 3.5" V-band downpipe and Vibrant 1799 resonated race mufflers for 650whp on E85 with HP Tuners VCM Suite custom OS calibration

Full drivetrain reinforcement: RPM Transmissions Stage 3 6L80E 6-speed automatic with billet input shaft, Sonnax Smart Shell, and upgraded 300M steel planetary gears, paired with an Auburn Gear Pro Series limited-slip differential with 3.91:1 gearing and C&R Racing aluminum differential cover

Suspension overhaul: KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers with 800lb/in front and 900lb/in rear springs, spherical bearing upper control arms (SPC Performance 25465), and Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm hollow) with poly bushings for reduced body roll and optimized weight transfer
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Liberty Walk LB Works G8 kit (fiberglass fenders, carbon fiber side skirts, and rear diffuser) with 1.5" fender flares to accommodate 295/30/20 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires on Enkei PF07 wheels (20x10.5 +25 front, 20x11 +35 rear)

Full carbon fiber aero package: Seibon carbon fiber hood (with functional heat extractor vents), APR Performance GTC-300 adjustable rear wing (30" chord, 6" height), and custom front splitter with integrated canards (3D-printed ABS with aluminum support rods)

Interior overhaul: Recaro Pole Position seats (fixed-back, carbon fiber shell) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede), and custom roll cage (1.75" DOM tubing, TIG-welded) with integrated fire suppression system (AFFF, 5lb bottle)
